questionHtml: Outline the role of lymphocytes in defence against disease.
markschemeHtml:
a. produce antibodies ✔

b. memory cells confer immunity ✔

c. specific immunity results from production of antibodies specific to a particular antigen ✔

d. recognize pathogens ✔

e. destroy foreign cells/cancer cells ✔

meta.title: Outline the role of lymphocytes in defence against disease.
breadcrumbLabels: C3.2.6. Lymphocytes as cells in the adaptive immune system that cooperate to produce antibodies
